message:
Add PhaseTracker metrics to CLI flow tests and E2E JSONL schema validator

e2e_cli_flows: instrument search_basic, view_command, health_command,
stats_command, and setup_indexed_env with PhaseTracker timing/throughput
metrics via tracker.metrics() API.

e2e_jsonl_schema_test (new): validate E2E JSONL output against expected
schemas with required fields per event type (run_start, run_end,
test_start, test_end, phase_start, phase_end, metrics, log) and common
fields (ts, event, run_id, runner).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
